untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) 'multiple asset classes at all-time highs simultaneously' — engine only has single-instrument indicators, no cross-asset class comparison capability; (2) 'media narrative of unsustainable wealth creation' — narrative sentiment cannot be quantified from price/technical indicators alone; (3) 'broad market breadth deterioration' — no breadth indicator (advance/decline line, McClellan Oscillator, etc.) in allowed list. Partially translated using price_pos_20 (52-week high proxy) and india_vix (complacency) as available substitutes, but core regime-shift detection logic is not implementable.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using price_pos_20 >= 0.99 as proxy for 'at all-time high' on individual instruments and india_vix < 50 as complacency indicator (inverted: below median volatility). However, the signal's core requirement—detecting synchronized ATH across multiple asset classes with media narrative confirmation—cannot be replicated in a single-instrument backtester without cross-asset data feeds and sentiment analysis. Exit condition uses 2% rally reversal (5-10 days) as reasonable proxy for 'clear reversal fails'. Position sizing and narrative weighting parameters from original signal could not be translated to technical rules.
